CGTN

Copied

The first Olympics with an equal gender split among athletes, the second city to host the Summer Olympics three times after London, 19 days of competition, 35 venues, 329 medal events spanning 32 sports, 10,500 athletes, 20,000 accredited journalists and 31,500 volunteers. These figures offer a glimpse into the grandeur of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games as the 100-day countdown commences.

The figures only refer to the Paris 2024 Olympic Games.
